data.content: Final implementation handoff: threaded the current working directory into the self-manage upgrade path, derived the git repo root without full app initialization, and suppressed the post-upgrade kno doctor hint only when git_hooks::check_hooks reports Pass. Added regression coverage for direct upgrade output with current hooks, missing hooks, stale hooks, and non-repo execution. Validation passed with make sanity at 95.05 percent coverage. Branch knots-a97a includes commit b9588b890c8a.
